block.text: Attack Rounds. It will automatically hit its target and reduce its ARMOUR score by 10. As you take your prize downstairs, you see another Guard Robot like the one you defeated. You hurry out of the lobby and back to your robot. You may install the Seeker Missile now, or save it for another robot. It may be moved from one robot to another, but it is lost if the robot carrying it is lost, or if it is fired. Turn to 206.
